# AODS Benchmark Pack

> AI-facing entrypoint for the AODS benchmark pack corpus.

## Documents

- [Atlas Release Ops overview](README.md): Cold-start routing for the benchmark corpus. Use for first-hop orientation. Capsule summary and route fanout across product, architecture, workflow, and operations slices.
- [Product lifecycle](docs/01-product-lifecycle.md): Goals, non-goals, discovery findings, milestones, authoring prompts, and design rationale.
- [Architecture and contracts](docs/02-architecture-and-contracts.md): System topology, release APIs, payload schemas, examples, templates, identifiers, and role enums.
- [Delivery workflows](docs/03-delivery-workflows.md): Approval workflow, publish sequence, rollout policy tree, lifecycle state machine, and analytics pipeline.
- [Operations and governance](docs/04-operations-and-governance.md): Approval rules, on-call mapping, event catalog, rollback strategy, temporal controls, and validation guidance. Escape-hatch artifacts and evidence-only material such as raw SQL or external snippets.
- [Harbor Change Control overview](harbor/README.md): Cold-start routing for the regulated change-control slice. Use for first-hop orientation. Capsule routes change control and audit evidence.
- [Change control](harbor/docs/01-change-control.md): Regulated change policy, approval rules, exception handling, and SOP authority alignment.
- [Audit evidence](harbor/docs/02-audit-evidence.md): Audit evidence requirements, retention windows, and raw-query references for external review.
